description_long: This obelisk is a modern, abstract monument constructed primarily from light gray stone or concrete, featuring two tall, angular pillars that intersect at sharp angles. The structure is set on a square base with a slightly raised platform, and is flanked by two symmetrical, blocky side supports that create a partially enclosed central space. The surfaces are smooth but matte, with visible seams and some weathering, suggesting outdoor placement. The rear of the obelisk displays rectangular plaques or panels, possibly for commemorative purposes, attached to the side supports. The overall design is geometric and minimalist, with no visible ornamentation or inscriptions on the main faces. The base is surrounded by a patch of grass and concrete, indicating installation in an open, landscaped urban area.
description: A modern, angular stone obelisk with intersecting pillars and a square base, flanked by blocky side supports and rear plaques. The design is minimalist and geometric, set on a grassy and concrete platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the intersecting pillars, open central space, and symmetrical side supports on a square base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rectangular plaques or panels attached to the side supports, with the pillars visible behind.
description_view_2: Angled front view emphasizing the geometric intersection of the pillars and the partially enclosed central area.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the plaques and the solid, blocky structure of the base and supports.
attribute_base_design: The base is a square platform made of the same stone or concrete as the obelisk, slightly raised above the ground and bordered by a patch of grass and concrete. It features blocky side supports that partially enclose the central area.
attribute_tip_design: The tip consists of two sharply angled, intersecting pillars with clean, flat surfaces and no decorative elements.
attribute_surrounding_features: A patch of grass and concrete paving immediately surrounds the base.
